text.message: autopick, forgot i queued for game
Not sure if you get 9 10 though...hence why I passed on it.
lol I do that ALL the time
well yeah, could have beed much worse
the more i look i think that would have been my pick
Hmm, well not I think I made a mistake by passing on it.
With 9 10 port you're in fantastic shape.
i dont expect that port to be free haha
I think it will be now
Black isn’t going to take it, should be free for you
Oh man...and now you get all the ore
i was thinking i should leave the ore
maybe i live the bot this decision also
Sure...leave the ore for me then...
Otherwise black can beat you to your port
not sure I would've left the ore for black
Green is in last...but with the sheep port setup it could be sneaky.
I wasn't the one who left the ore
red if I give you the spot, can we hit black instead of fighting lol
If you don't get the spot blue, I think you have no chance of the win
So you kinda HAVE to fight for it.
But would certainly be a monster with it.
I mean I think I'm in a decent spot, you'll win 80% of the time anyway black
80 percent might be a stretch, but the early city is big for me...can't lie
Blue realized they had no shot without it
sorry had to take it, too many cards
I CAN take the port from you
you already said red can win without it black
Well, can't lie...red is in a tough spot now
I think we just have to block black's wheat
But I can't pass up the double wheat opportunity
green black is in such a good spot, don't think we can 1:!
just embargo. red and I will need to trade you anyway
sorry you can pull for one but you're doing too well with that spot
Would rather block red there, but this is how it goes.
I'm more worried about you than red
The fact that I have coordinated 9s and 10s is pretty big.
yeah we should probably block 10 wheat thinking about it
it's a free resource and goes too well with your setup
You can...but I have the 9 now too
what do you think red and green? Solo 10 wheat until we can catch up
yeah but 9 is not a city
It was...still have loads of wheat though
good I think that means no city
I don't think I even want another city right now honestly.
Too good to not do it there.
red this is why you take 91011 in that spot
only reason this happend is i didnt gate any brick (6,5) in first 2 orbits
He can’t be on 9, the dev is either knight or point
no because you would've taken 348 not port first
Yeah, that was odd for sure.
he still beats you to port if you take 348
He still wins but not quite as fast
wow that was so much work lol
I mean, you revitalize red now
yeah but him at 8 is better than you at 10
Yeah, I always knew you were in last green
Was gonna take a while to get your setup going
So not I will lose army and red will be the target...just checking right?
i could have gotten the road and settle without their help, only plow was extra
Without the plow you just lose red
yeah, that was the answer to "revitalize"
Here's the deal...if you let red get another city or start popping devs, they win
red popping devs will not win
just realized he can win with 3 roads
Ok, yeah...didn't think I would retain army
You should have taken it blue
I haven’t ended a game on 2 in like a year
